<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--DEFAULT COMMAND-->
  <Command Name="__default_command" IsBranch="false" IsDefault="true" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.DefaultCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.DefaultCommand+Settings">
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="c" Long="continue" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Continue the most recent session</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="dry-run" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show what would be done without executing</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="fork" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Fork the resumed session (create a new branch from the 
session)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="m" Long="model" Value="MODEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Model to use (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, llama3.2)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-stream" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Disable streaming output (wait for complete 
response)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Output format: text (default), json, jsonl (streaming JSON 
lines)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="plain" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Plain text output without ANSI colors, spinners, or 
formatting</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="plan" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Enter planning mode (read-only exploration)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="p" Long="prompt" Value="PROMPT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Run a single prompt and exit</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="provider" Value="PROVIDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Provider (openai, ollama, gpustack)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="r" Long="resume" Value="SESSION_ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Resume a specific session by ID</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="show-thinking" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show thinking/reasoning content from the 
model</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="show-tokens" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show token usage statistics</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="update" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Check for updates after execution</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--RUN-->
  <Command Name="run" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.RunCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.RunCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Run a single prompt and exit</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="PROMPT" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The prompt to execute</Description>
      </Argument>
      <Option Short="" Long="auto-commit" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Automatically commit changes after successful 
execution</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="commit-message" Value="MESSAGE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Custom commit message (default: auto-generated from 
prompt)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="json" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Output response as JSON</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="m" Long="model" Value="MODEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Model to use</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="p" Long="prompt" Value="PROMPT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The prompt to execute (alternative to 
argument)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="provider" Value="PROVIDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Provider (gpustack, lmsupply)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="server" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Run in server mode (JSON Lines stdin/stdout)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="session-id" Value="SESSION_ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Session ID for server mode</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="show-thinking" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show thinking/reasoning content from the 
model</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="show-tokens" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show token usage statistics</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="run" />
      <Example commandLine="-p" />
      <Example commandLine=""List all files in the current directory""
/>
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--SET-->
  <Command Name="set" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.SetCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.SetCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Set a configuration value</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="KEY" Position="0" Required="true" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Configuration key (e.g., openai.apiKey, 
anthropic.model)</Description>
      </Argument>
      <Argument Name="VALUE" Position="1" Required="true" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Value to set</Description>
      </Argument>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="set" />
      <Example commandLine="openai.apiKey" />
      <Example commandLine="sk-xxx" />
      <Example commandLine="set" />
      <Example commandLine="anthropic.model" />
      <Example commandLine="claude-sonnet-4-20250514" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--GET-->
  <Command Name="get" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.GetCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.GetCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Get a configuration value</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="KEY" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Configuration key (e.g., openai.apiKey). If omitted, shows 
all settings.</Description>
      </Argument>
      <Option Short="" Long="raw" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Output raw value without formatting (for 
scripts)</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="get" />
      <Example commandLine="openai.apiKey" />
      <Example commandLine="get" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--UNSET-->
  <Command Name="unset" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.UnsetCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.UnsetCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Remove a configuration value</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="KEY" Position="0" Required="true" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Configuration key to remove (e.g., 
openai.apiKey)</Description>
      </Argument>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="unset" />
      <Example commandLine="openai.apiKey" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--CONFIG-->
  <Command Name="config" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.ConfigCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.ConfigCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Show all configuration</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="ACTION" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Action to perform (show, path)</Description>
      </Argument>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="config" />
      <Example commandLine="show" />
      <Example commandLine="config" />
      <Example commandLine="path" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--MODELS-->
  <Command Name="models" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.ModelsCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.ModelsCommand+Settings">
    <Description>List available models from configured providers</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="json" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Output as JSON</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="p" Long="provider" Value="PROVIDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Filter by provider (e.g., openai, anthropic, 
gpustack)</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="models" />
      <Example commandLine="models" />
      <Example commandLine="--provider" />
      <Example commandLine="openai" />
      <Example commandLine="models" />
      <Example commandLine="--json" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--DOCTOR-->
  <Command Name="doctor" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.DoctorCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.DoctorCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Diagnose configuration and connectivity issues</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="fix" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Attempt to fix common issues automatically</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show detailed diagnostic information</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="doctor" />
      <Example commandLine="doctor" />
      <Example commandLine="--verbose" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--UPDATE-->
  <Command Name="update" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.UpdateCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.UpdateCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Check for and install updates</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="check" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Check for updates without installing</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Force update even if already up to date</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="update" />
      <Example commandLine="update" />
      <Example commandLine="--check" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--SESSIONS-->
  <Command Name="sessions" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="IronHive.Cli.Commands.SessionsCommand" 
Settings="IronHive.Cli.Commands.SessionsCommand+Settings">
    <Description>List and manage conversation sessions</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="action" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Action: list (default), delete <id></Description>
      </Argument>
      <Argument Name="id" Position="1" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Session ID (for delete action)</Description>
      </Argument>
      <Option Short="n" Long="limit" Value="COUNT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
        <Description>Number of sessions to show</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Output format: text (default), json</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="sessions" />
      <Example commandLine="sessions" />
      <Example commandLine="list" />
      <Example commandLine="sessions" />
      <Example commandLine="delete" />
      <Example commandLine="<session-id>" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
</Model>Error: 'IronHive.Agent.Mcp.McpPluginManager' type only implements 
IAsyncDisposable. Use DisposeAsync to dispose the container.
